mapper.sql: SELECT sr.*, u.display_name FROM session_requests sr LEFT JOIN users u ON u.line_user_id = sr.line_user_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO session_requests (line_user_id, request_date, request_time, note) VALUES (#{lineUserId}, #{requestDate}, #{requestTime}, #{note})
mapper.select: WHERE sr.line_user_id = #{lineUserId} ORDER BY sr.created_at DESC
WHERE sr.status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY sr.created_at ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE session_requests SET status = 'APPROVED', reviewed_by = #{reviewedBy}, review_note = #{reviewNote}, session_id = #{sessionId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE session_requests SET status = 'REJECTED', reviewed_by = #{reviewedBy}, review_note = #{reviewNote}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
